8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Appli/IAppServiceMng.h"
9 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Geometry/IGeometryMng.h"
10 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/IExpressionMng.h"
11 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/RunTimeSystem/IRunTimeSystemMng.h"
12 
13 #include "ServiceTestMngModule.h"
14 
15 #include <arcane/ITimeLoopMng.h>
16 
17 
18 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 
21 #define ADD_OPTIONAL_SERVICE(SERVICE_NAME,STRING_NAME) \
22  if( options()->SERVICE_NAME.size() > 0 ) \
23  addService(options()->SERVICE_NAME[0]); \
24  else \
25  addMissingServiceInfo( typeid(options()->SERVICE_NAME[0]).name(), STRING_NAME ); \
26 
27 void
28 ServiceTestMngModule::
29 initializeAppServiceMng()
30 {
31 
32  if (m_initialized)
33  return;
34  info() << "Initializing service manager";
35 
36  ADD_OPTIONAL_SERVICE(geometryService,"Geometry");
37  ADD_OPTIONAL_SERVICE(expressionMng,"Expression Manager");
38  ADD_OPTIONAL_SERVICE(runtimeSystemMng,"RunTimeSystem Manager");
39 
40  m_initialized = true ;
41 }
42 
43 void ServiceTestMngModule::init() {
44  info() << "init";
45 
46  initializeAppServiceMng();
47 
48 //#ifndef NO_USER_WARNING
49 //#ifndef WIN32
50 //#warning "TODO: enforce policy about geometry update"
51 //#endif
52 //#endif
53  // This is a application initialization module, so it must define the policy
54  IAppServiceMng * app_service_mng = IAppServiceMng::instance(subDomain()->serviceMng());
55  IGeometryMng * geometry = app_service_mng->find<IGeometryMng>(false);
56  if (geometry)
57  geometry->setPolicyTolerance(true);
58 
59  this->options()->service[0]->init();
60 }
61 
62 
63 using namespace Arcane;
64 ARCANE_REGISTER_MODULE_SERVICETESTMNG(ServiceTestMngModule);
